item.title: Custom Hexagonal Rigid Gift Box with Magnetic Closure Gold Foil Embossing
item.description: Hexagonal rigid gift box with magnetic closure and gold foil embossing — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience. The six-sided geometric design commands attention on retail shelves and conveys premium quality before the box is even opened. Each hexagon face provides a generous branding canvas for gold foil logo embossing, debossed patterns, or full-color CMYK printing. The magnetic closure delivers a satisfying snap-and-seal experience, while the flocked velvet interior cradles your product in luxury.

item.title: Custom Hexagonal Tea Gift Box with Magnetic Closure and Satin Ribbon
item.description: Custom hexagonal tea gift box with magnetic closure and satin ribbon pull by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com with 23 years of manufacturing excellence (founded 2003). This distinctive hexagonal rigid box combines the elegance of traditional tea ceremony aesthetics with modern luxury packaging engineering. The six-sided design stands out on retail shelves, while the concealed magnetic closure and satin ribbon pull create a refined opening experience. Inside, custom die-cut compartments cradle tea bags, loose-leaf pouches, or tea accessories. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses across our 18,000 sqm facility (10,000+8,000 smart factory) (2025 expansion). Daily output: 1.7 million color boxes + 220,000+ gift boxes.

item.title: Custom Octagonal Rigid Gift Box with UV Spot Pattern and Magnetic Book-Style Closure
item.description:
Product Overview

This custom octagonal rigid gift box combines the geometric sophistication of an eight-sided shape with UV spot pattern detailing and a book-style magnetic closure — a standout packaging format for premium brands seeking differentiation. Unlike standard rectangular boxes, the octagonal form creates visual intrigue that commands attention on retail shelves and in unboxing moments. Each box is manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing on Heidelberg 7+1 UV offset presses with Bobst SP 102 BMA precision die-cutting for ±0.2mm edge accuracy. The book-style magnetic flap opens like a hardcover book, revealing the gift with deliberate, luxury-paced reveal. With over 23 years of rigid box expertise, ISO 9001:2015 quality management, FSC Chain-of-Custody certification, and 220,000+ daily rigid box output across an 18,000 sqm integrated facility, Bincai delivers octagonal packaging that combines structural innovation with manufacturing reliability.

The two-piece telescopic design opens smoothly to reveal the interior, while the concealed magnetic closure provides secure closure without visible hardware. The genuine leather carry handle adds both functionality and a premium tactile element that elevates the unboxing experience to a luxury ritual. Produced on KBA Rapida 105 4-color and Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV presses across our 18,000 sqm facility (10,000+8,000 sqm smart factory, 2025 expansion). Daily output: 1.7 million color boxes + 220,000+ gift boxes.

item.title: Rigid Gift Box with Sliding Drawer Pull Ribbon and Velvet Interior — Premium Jewelry Presentation
item.description:
Product Overview

This rigid gift box features a precision sliding drawer with satin pull ribbon and fully flocked velvet interior — engineered for premium jewelry presentation where the unboxing ritual matters as much as the product inside. The drawer glides smoothly on reinforced greyboard rails tested to 10,000+ open/close cycles, while N52 neodymium magnets provide a satisfying snap-close action. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing on Heidelberg 7+1 UV offset with Bobst SP 102 BMA precision die-cutting, every drawer achieves ±0.2mm fit tolerance. With 23 years of rigid box expertise, ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certification, and 220,000+ daily rigid box output across an 18,000 sqm integrated facility, Bincai delivers sliding drawer packaging that elevates every jewelry reveal.

item.title: Telescopic Rigid Gift Box with Gold Foil Monogram Window for Luxury Apparel Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

The telescopic rigid gift box with gold foil monogram window is designed for luxury apparel brands — from premium shirts and silk scarves to cashmere sweaters and designer accessories. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing (founded 2003, Foshan, 18,000 sqm, ISO 9001:2015 & FSC-C147399 certified), this two-piece telescopic box features a soft-touch laminated exterior with a precision die-cut window that frames the brand monogram printed on the inner lid. The telescopic lid slides smoothly over the base, creating a reveal experience that communicates luxury. Daily output reaches 1.7 million boxes on KBA Rapida 105 and Heidelberg CD 102 7+1 UV presses with Bobst SP 102 BMA/E die-cutters, Bobst Visioncut 106 LER, and Bobst Expertfold 110 A2.

item.title: Two-Piece Rigid Gift Box with Embossed Linen-Texture Wrap & Satin Ribbon Pull
item.description:
Product Overview

The Two-Piece Rigid Gift Box with Embossed Linen-Texture Wrap combines tactile sophistication with practical elegance. The telescopic lid and base system — precision-cut to a 3mm overlap tolerance — ensures a smooth, satisfying fit that speaks quality before the recipient even sees the contents. Wrapped in imported linen-embossed art paper from Fedrigoni (Italy) or Gmund (Germany), the texture invites touch — natural linen, silk weave, leather grain, sand finish, and 8 additional patterns create a sensory unboxing experience that flat-printed boxes cannot match. Dual satin ribbon pulls on the base allow effortless lid removal without tilting or shaking the contents, making it ideal for delicate items like silk scarves, hand-rolled chocolates, or fine stationery.

The classic two-piece telescoping design features a separate lid and base wrapped in premium art paper, with a grosgrain ribbon tie that adds an elegant unboxing ritual. item.title: Elegant Wedding Favor Two-Tier Rigid Gift Box with Satin Ribbon and Gold Foil
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Elegant Wedding Favor Two-Tier Rigid Gift Box transforms wedding gifting into a curated experience. Two stacked compartments — one for the main favor (chocolates, mini champagne, scented candles) and one for a personal note or keepsake — are revealed in sequence as the satin ribbon is untied. Gold foil ‘Mr & Mrs’ lettering across the lid makes every table setting feel like a five-star event. Manufactured at our 18,000 sqm integrated facility in Foshan using KBA 1050 4-color offset and Heidelberg 7+1 UV foil presses. 23 years of paper box mastery, ISO 9001:2015 and FSC certified, with 1.7 million boxes shipped daily to 50+ countries.

item.description: Deep-embossed logo rigid presentation box with double satin ribbon closure for corporate gifting and premium product launches by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com with 23 years of manufacturing excellence (founded 2003). item.description:
Product Overview

The signature satin ribbon pull-tab opens a perfectly tensioned hinged lid to reveal a removable velvet-flocked tray that elegantly presents pen and notebook sets, watch and cufflink pairings, or custom curated corporate gift collections. 3mm CNC-wrapped greyboard construction with precision mitered corners. 23 years of manufacturing. ISO 9001:2015 & FSC certified from our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility.

item.title: Luxury Square Rigid Perfume Gift Box — Dual Magnetic Closure with Gold Foil
item.description: Luxury square rigid perfume gift box with dual magnetic side flaps and gold foil detailing — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. This premium two-piece telescopic rigid box features an innovative dual magnetic side-flap opening mechanism that parts dramatically to reveal the fragrance bottle cradled in a custom satin-lined foam insert. The exterior showcases matte lamination with selective spot UV accents and gold foil hot stamping for a sophisticated luxury brand presentation. The dual magnetic closure provides secure, satisfying closure with an elegant reveal. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses across our 18,000 sqm factory.

item.title: Premium Rigid Watch Gift Box — Velvet Cushion Insert + Magnetic Closure Lid
item.description: Premium rigid watch gift box with velvet cushion insert and magnetic closure lid — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. Designed for luxury watch brands, timepiece retailers, and corporate watch gifting, this 2mm rigid board box delivers the weight, tactile quality, and presentation that premium watches demand. The exterior is wrapped in flocked velvet or premium leatherette with gold or silver hot foil branding, while the interior features a removable satin pillow cushion that holds the watch securely. The magnetic closure lid provides a satisfying premium snap. Produced across our 18,000 sqm factory with 1.7M daily output capacity.

item.title: Rigid Book-Style Magnetic Closure Gift Box — Premium Chocolate & Confectionery with Satin Ribbon
item.description: Rigid book-style magnetic closure gift box designed for premium chocolates, truffles, and fine confectionery — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. The exterior can be wrapped in art paper, leatherette, or linen with gold foil hot stamping for a luxury brand impression. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses across our 18,000 sqm factory.

item.title: Rigid Cigar Collector Box — Spanish Cedar Interior with Humidor-Style Hinged Lid
item.description: Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003) crafts this premium rigid cigar collector box for luxury tobacco brands, duty-free retailers, and limited-edition releases. Built in our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility under ISO 9001:2015 and FSC certification, each box features genuine Spanish cedar (Cedrela odorata) wood veneer interior lining — the traditional material of choice for cigar storage due to its natural moisture-regulating properties and aromatic oils that complement cigar aging.

item.title: Rigid Drawer Box Premium Tea Set Gift Packaging 3-Layer

Satin-lined compartments protect teapots, cups, and tea canisters from scratches during transport and display. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses across our 18,000 sqm facility (10,000+8,000 smart factory, 2025 expansion). Daily output: 1.7 million color boxes + 220,000+ gift boxes. ISO 9001:2015 and FSC® certified.

item.title: Rigid Hinged-Lid Photo Archive Storage Box — Acid-Free Archival Document & Photograph Preservation Box
item.description:
Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003) delivers museum-grade archival storage boxes engineered for long-term photograph and document preservation. Unlike standard gift boxes, every material in this box — from the grey board core to the covering fabric to the adhesive — is selected and tested for archival safety: acid-free, lignin-free, and pH-neutral (pH 8.0–9.5 buffered with 3% calcium carbonate reserve).

Manufactured in our 18,000 sqm dual-factory in Foshan, Guangdong, the box features a 2–3mm rigid grey board core wrapped in archival-quality book cloth or buckram. The hinged lid is reinforced with metal corners for decades of repeated opening and closing. All adhesives are pH-neutral PVA that passes the PAT (Photographic Activity Test) per ISO 18916 — meaning no chemical interaction that could yellow, fade, or degrade photographic prints, negatives, or documents stored inside. This is the same standard used by the Library of Congress and national archives worldwide.

item.title: Rigid Perfume Luxury Gift Box — Ribbon Closure & Hot Foil Stamping
item.description:
Product Overview

Bincai’s rigid perfume gift box is engineered for luxury fragrance brands that demand shelf presence and unboxing drama. The 2.0mm greyboard core wrapped in soft-touch 157gsm art paper creates a substantial, premium feel. A color-matched satin ribbon closure provides elegant access while Bobst BMA hot foil stamping delivers metallic branding with ±0.2mm registration accuracy. The interior features a flocked PET tray that cradles bottles of any shape — rectangular, cylindrical, or avant-garde. Manufactured in our Foshan smart factory (18,000 sqm) on Heidelberg 7+1 UV offset and KBA 1050 4-color presses, every box meets the exacting standards of prestige fragrance houses.

item.title: Rigid Telescopic Round Hat Box — Custom Print with Ribbon Handle
item.description:
Product Overview

Bincai’s rigid telescopic round hat box combines the structural integrity of cylindrical forming with luxury gift-box finishing. The 2mm greyboard body is machine-wrapped in 157gsm art paper with full CMYK offset printing, accented by a metallic gold foil band and a reinforced satin ribbon carry handle. The telescopic lid fits with precision-tooled tolerance (learn more in our deep dive on rigid box engineering and structural design), and the flat-top design allows for stacked display in retail environments. Manufactured on Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses with custom cylindrical forming dies in our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility. 23 years of luxury packaging expertise.

item.title: Rigid Telescopic Round Hat Box with Satin Ribbon Handle for Premium Apparel Gifts
item.description: Rigid telescopic round hat box with satin ribbon carry handle — designed for premium apparel, luxury fashion accessories, and high-end corporate gifting. The classic round silhouette with telescopic lid makes a distinguished unboxing statement, while the integrated satin ribbon handle provides comfortable carrying. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience (founded 2003). KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses deliver flawless print quality across an 18,000 sqm dual-factory campus. Daily output exceeds 1.7 million boxes.

item.title: Rigid Two-Piece Cigar Presentation Box — Spanish Cedar Lining, Humidor-Style
item.description: This Rigid Two-Piece Cigar Presentation Box is a luxury packaging solution for premium cigar brands and tobacco retailers. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003) at our 18,000 sqm dual-factory facility in Foshan, Pearl River Delta, this humidor-style box combines traditional craftsmanship with modern production precision. The interior is lined with authentic Spanish cedar (Cedrela odorata) veneer — the gold standard for cigar storage — which naturally regulates humidity and imparts the classic cedar aroma prized by cigar aficionados. Each box is produced on our KBA Rapida 1050 4-color offset and Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV presses with a daily capacity of 1.7 million boxes, ensuring consistent quality at any scale.

item.title: Rigid Two-Piece Corporate Awards Presentation Box with Embossed Logo & Satin Lining
item.description:
Product Overview

This rigid two-piece corporate awards presentation box delivers the gravitas that prestigious recognition deserves. The telescopic lid-and-base construction creates a dramatic unboxing moment — lift the lid to reveal the award nestled in a precision-cut foam cradle against a backdrop of premium satin. The lid exterior features your organization’s logo in raised blind embossing or gold foil, communicating prestige before the box is even opened. Designed for corporate awards, employee recognition plaques, achievement medals, crystal trophies, and ceremonial gifts, this box transforms any award into a memorable presentation experience. Produced by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing — manufacturing premium packaging since 2003 — each box uses 2.5mm FSC-certified greyboard with 200gsm art paper wrap and precision die-cut EVA foam inserts. Our 18,000 sqm facility with daily output of 220,000+ rigid boxes ensures consistent quality at any volume. The two-piece rigid construction provides superior protection during shipping and creates a permanent storage case that recipients will keep long after the ceremony.

item.title: Rigid Two-Piece Telescope Corporate Gift Box — Custom Embossing & Hot Foil for Luxury Brand Sets
item.description: The rigid two-piece telescope box is the definitive packaging format for corporate gifting — a structured, high-perceived-value presentation that elevates branded merchandise, executive gifts, and client welcome kits into memorable brand experiences. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a 23-year Foshan paper box specialist operating from an 18,000 sqm dual-factory, this box combines the classic telescope lid-and-base construction with custom embossing, precision hot foil stamping, and a satin ribbon pull for effortless access.

item.title: Rigid Two-Piece Telescopic Wedding Favor Box — Magnetic Closure with Satin Ribbon & Gold Foil
item.description: The rigid two-piece telescopic wedding favor box transforms guest gifting from an afterthought into a statement of elegance. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a 23-year Foshan paper box specialist with 18,000 sqm of dual-factory production space — this compact favor box combines the premium feel of 2mm rigid greyboard with full-color CMYK offset printing, precision magnetic closure, and luxurious gold hot foil detailing. The satin ribbon pull adds a tactile finishing touch, making every guest feel honored.

item.title: Two-Piece Rigid Gift Box with Embossed Pattern and Satin Ribbon Pull for Luxury Apparel
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Two-Piece Rigid Gift Box combines sculptural blind embossing with luxurious satin ribbon pulls to create a tactile and visual experience worthy of premium fashion brands. Each box features precision two-piece telescoping construction — lid and base wrapped separately — with soft-touch matte lamination, N52 neodymium magnetic closure, and fully lined satin or velvet interior. The embossed pattern is created with custom brass dies on our Heidelberg 7+1 UV press, achieving crisp, sculptural relief that catches light and invites touch. With 23 years of rigid box expertise, Bincai operates from an 18,000 sqm dual facility producing 220,000+ gift boxes daily under ISO 9001:2015 and FSC certification.

item.title: Two-Tier Telescopic Rigid Wedding Favor Box — Gold Foil Hot Stamping, Satin Ribbon Closure
item.description: The Two-Tier Telescopic Rigid Wedding Favor Box represents the pinnacle of luxury event packaging. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. at our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility, this two-piece telescopic box features a removable upper tray and deeper lower compartment — perfect for presenting an assortment of wedding favors, luxury confectionery, or bridal party gifts. Gold foil hot stamping on premium art paper and a hand-tied satin ribbon closure create an unforgettable unboxing experience that elevates brand perception. Built on 2.5mm rigid greyboard with ±0.15mm foil registration, every box is produced on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses with ISO 9001:2015 quality systems and FSC Chain-of-Custody certification.

item.title: Collapsible Flat-Ship Rigid Gift Box — 2-Piece Magnetic Closure, Premium Custom Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

The Collapsible Flat-Ship Rigid Gift Box solves the fundamental logistics challenge of rigid packaging: bulk. Traditional rigid boxes ship fully assembled, consuming up to 5× the freight volume of their flat counterparts. Our patented collapsible design — engineered by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. across 23 years of paper box manufacturing — ships completely flat and assembles by hand in under 10 seconds without glue, tape, or tools. The result: 70% freight savings without a single compromise on the structural integrity or premium feel customers expect from a rigid setup box.

item.title: Custom Rigid Trunk-Style Gift Box with Metal Corners & Leather Handle
item.description:
Product Overview

The Custom Rigid Trunk-Style Gift Box fuses old-world travel-trunk aesthetics with modern precision manufacturing. Produced by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — operating an 18,000 sqm facility (10,000 sqm main factory + 8,000 sqm smart factory commissioned 2025) with 23 years of paper packaging expertise — this trunk box features real metal corner protectors, a stitched full-grain leather carry handle, and a telescopic lid that evokes vintage steamer trunks. It transforms any product into an heirloom unboxing experience that consumers keep and repurpose.

item.title: Custom Two-Tier Telescopic Rigid Gift Box with Magnetic Closure
item.description:
Product Overview

Our custom two-tier telescopic rigid gift box delivers an elevated unboxing experience through its dual-level presentation. The telescopic lid lifts off to reveal two stacked trays — each foam-lined and wrapped in luxury art paper — creating a dramatic reveal for premium products. Constructed from 2.5mm rigid greyboard and manufactured on our Heidelberg 7+1 UV press with precision Bobst die-cutting, this box combines structural integrity with visual sophistication. The soft-touch matte lamination adds a velvet-like tactility while the hidden neodymium magnetic closure ensures the lid seats perfectly every time. Produced at Bincai’s 18,000 sqm integrated factory with 23 years of premium packaging expertise, each box undergoes a rigorous 7-stage quality control process — from incoming board inspection (ISO 186) to final packaging audit. Perfect for gourmet chocolate collections, corporate gift sets, premium cosmetics duo packs, and luxury confectionery assortments.

item.title: Drawer-Style Rigid Watch & Accessory Gift Box — Dual Compartment Velvet Interior
item.description:
Product Overview

Premium drawer-style rigid watch and accessory gift box with dual compartments — designed and manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience (founded 2003). This innovative two-tier design combines a top-level watch display platform with a smooth-gliding pull-out drawer for accessories, merging premium presentation with functional storage that watch collectors and luxury brands demand. The top compartment features a custom die-cut EVA or PU foam watch pillow (±0.2mm tolerance) in your choice of velvet, suede, or leatherette lining, while the drawer below accommodates extra straps, bracelet tools, warranty cards, and owner’s manuals. The magnetic slide-lock mechanism uses N42 neodymium magnets for secure closure with a satisfying glide action — tested for 20,000+ open/close cycles with zero degradation. Produced on KBA Rapida 105 4-color offset (15,000 sheets/hour) and Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV presses (inter-deck UV curing, single-pass CMYK+spot+coating) with Bobst SP 102 BMA hot foil stamping at ±0.15mm registration at our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility. CNC corner wrapping ensures ±0.3mm precision at all four corners. Daily output of 220,000+ rigid boxes under ISO 9001:2015, FSC Chain-of-Custody, and Sedex SMETA certification.

item.title: Hexagonal Rigid Gift Box with Magnetic Closure and Satin Ribbon for Premium Confectionery
item.description: Elegant hexagonal rigid gift box with magnetic closure and satin ribbon for premium confectionery — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com with 23 years of luxury packaging expertise (founded 2003). The six-sided geometry creates an instantly recognizable premium silhouette that elevates chocolates, macarons, truffles, and artisan sweets from commodity to luxury gift. N52 neodymium magnets hidden in the lid edge provide a seamless invisible closure — no visible clasps or hinges. A hand-tied satin ribbon in your brand color adds a tactile finishing touch that invites untying. Inside, a food-grade PET tray with individual cavities cradles each chocolate or macaron, preventing movement and preserving delicate decorations. Produced on Heidelberg 7+1 UV and KBA 1050 4-color presses across 18,000 sqm factory. FDA-compliant food contact materials throughout.

Built on a 2.5mm greyboard rigid base with woodgrain-textured art paper exterior and genuine Spanish cedar veneer interior lining — the same aromatic cedar used in premium walk-in humidors. Gold foil-stamped custom branding, magnetic flip-lid closure, and a recessed Boveda humidity pack holder make this the definitive cigar gift box for tobacconists, hotel gift shops, and premium cigar brands. Manufactured at our 18,000 sqm integrated facility with 23 years of paper box expertise and 220,000+ gift boxes daily output.

The rigid construction wraps around a precision die-cut EVA foam cradle that secures standard 750ml wine or spirit bottles, while the satin ribbon bow closure and brushed gold foil exterior deliver luxury at every touch point. Manufactured at Bincai’s 18,000 sqm integrated facility with KBA 1050 4-color offset and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses, each box passes through 7 rigorous QC gates — from incoming board inspection (ISO 186) to ISTA 1A transit testing. Backed by 23 years of premium packaging expertise (founded 2003) and ISO 9001:2015 + FSC Chain-of-Custody certification, this hexagonal box is the definitive packaging solution for wineries, distilleries, corporate gifting, wedding favors, and luxury retail.

ISO 9001:2015, FSC Chain-of-Custody (FSC-C147399), and RoHS certified. Daily output 1.7 million boxes. MOQ 500.

item.title: Art Pattern Square Paper Gift Box for Premium Packaging
item.description:

Premium custom art pattern square paper gift box for premium packaging manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com, Audited Supplier with 23 years of experience (founded 2003). item.title: Custom Double-Opening Rigid Gift Box with Clear Window
item.description: Premium custom double-opening rigid gift box with clear window — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com, Audited Supplier with 23 years of experience. item.title: Custom Luxury Black Rigid Gift Box with Leather Handle
item.description:
Premium custom luxury black rigid gift box with leather handle manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com, Audited Supplier with 23 years of experience.

Features

  • Rigid 2.0-3.0mm greyboard construction with 157-250gsm art paper wrap
  • Premium matte black lamination with soft-touch feel
  • Genuine leather carry handle, reinforced rivet attachment
  • Hot foil stamping (gold/silver/rose gold) for logo and branding
  • Magnetic snap closure or ribbon tie options
  • Velvet flocking or satin interior lining
  • CMYK offset printing + Pantone spot colors on KBA 1050 press
  • ISO 9001:2015 certified quality management
  • FSC certified sustainable materials

Applications

Industry Application Key Feature
Luxury Fashion Handbag, accessory packaging Leather handle + magnetic closure
Jewelry Premium necklace/bracelet sets Velvet interior + foil branding
Cosmetics High-end skincare gift sets Soft-touch finish + insert tray
Corporate Gifts Executive gift boxes Custom logo embossing
Wine & Spirits Premium bottle presentation Rigid protection + handle portability

Customization Options

Option Available Choices
Size Range 150×100×50mm to 500×400×200mm
Material 2.0-3.0mm greyboard + 157-250gsm art paper wrap
Print Method CMYK offset (KBA 1050), Pantone spot, hot foil
Finishes Matte/gloss lamination, soft-touch, spot UV, embossing/debossing
Foil Colors Gold, silver, rose gold, copper, holographic
Handle Type Leather, ribbon, metal chain, die-cut
Closure Magnetic snap, ribbon tie, hidden magnet, tuck flap
Interior Velvet flocking, satin, EVA foam, cardboard partitions
MOQ 500-1000 units (standard), 3000+ (custom structures)

Production Specifications

Specification Detail
Press KBA 1050 4-color offset (740×1050mm, 15,000+ sph)
Greyboard 2.0-3.0mm rigid greyboard, FSC certified
Wrap Paper 157-250gsm art paper, C1S or C2S
Foil Stamping Heidelberg cylinder, up to 5 foil colors per box
Embossing Copper die, 0.5-1.5mm depth, single/multi-level
Assembly Semi-automated + manual QC at each station
Daily Output 1.7M color boxes + 220K+ rigid boxes (post-2025 smart factory)

Production Quality & Testing

Test Standard Specification
Material Inspection Digital scale, moisture meter, caliper Greyboard GSM ±5%, moisture ≤8%, caliper ±0.2mm
Print Registration Heidelberg Prinect inline ±0.15mm color-to-color, inline spectrophotometry
Color Fidelity X-Rite eXact — ΔE vs. master under D65 ΔE ≤ 2.0
Foil Adhesion ASTM F2252 — 3M 610 tape test Zero foil lift after tape peel
Lamination Bond Peel test ≥2.5 N/cm²
Embossing Depth Digital depth gauge ±0.1mm of specified depth
Die-Cutting Bobst flatbed ±0.3mm panel tolerance
Edge Alignment Visual + gauge check Gap ≤1mm at wrapped corners
Handle Attachment Pull-force test ≥15kg before failure (leather handle with rivet)
Magnetic Closure 100-cycle fatigue test Force remains 3.0–5.0kg throughout
Drop Test ISTA 1A — 10 drops from 760mm No structural failure, lid stays closed
Final Visual 100% under 5000K lighting No scratches, scuffs, wrap bubbles
AQL Sampling ISO 2859-1 Level II AQL 2.5 (major), AQL 1.0 (minor)

Seven-Stage Quality Control Gates

Gate Stage Inspection Defect Trigger
G1 Raw Material Incoming Greyboard GSM/caliper/moisture, art paper GSM, leather handle tensile strength, magnet grade N35, hot foil batch test, FSC documentation Out-of-spec → lot rejection
G2 Pre-Press Proofing Digital proof vs. master, foil die alignment, embossing die test impression, color calibration on selected art paper Color shift >ΔE 2.0 → recalibration
G3 Printing & Foil Stamping Color ΔE every 500 sheets, foil registration ±0.1mm, foil coverage uniformity, embossing crispness ΔE threshold → press stop; foil misregistration → die realignment
G4 Board Cutting & Die-Cutting Panel dimensions ±0.3mm, groove depth for hinge edges, corner radius consistency Deviation → die recalibration
G5 Lamination & Wrapping Lamination: zero bubbles/delamination; Wrap: corner fold precision, tension uniformity, no creases Defect → re-lamination or rewrap
G6 Hardware & Assembly Leather handle rivet attachment pull-test (sampling), magnet placement ±0.5mm, velvet/satin lining adhesion, insert fit Handle failure → batch rework; magnet offset → repositioning
G7 Final QC & Packing ISTA 1A drop, 100% visual under 5000K, handle pull (sampling), magnet cycle, count accuracy, polybag + master carton Drop failure → batch quarantine

Sustainability & Compliance

Standard Scope Status
ISO 9001:2015 Quality management system — design, production, delivery Certified
FSC Chain-of-Custody Fiber traceability — forest to finished box FSC certified
REACH EU chemical safety regulation Compliant — adhesives, inks, coatings, leather treatments
EN 71-3 Migration of heavy metals — inks, coatings, leather dyes Compliant
Prop 65 California Safe Drinking Water and Toxic Enforcement Act Compliant
Sedex SMETA Ethical trade and responsible sourcing audit 4-Pillar audit completed

Environmental Note: The rigid greyboard body and art paper wrap are fully recyclable in standard paper streams. The leather handle represents a complexity — while leather itself is a natural material, we offer several sustainable alternatives: (1) recycled leather composite handle (post-industrial leather fiber bonded with natural rubber latex — reduces virgin leather demand by 85%), (2) cork handle (FSC-certified, renewable, biodegradable), (3) cotton webbing handle (organic cotton, GOTS certified), or (4) die-cut kraft paper handle (fully recyclable in paper stream). For brands with strict plastic-free policies, we can replace the matte lamination with aqueous coating for equivalent scuff protection without plastic film.

Produced on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses across our 18,000 sqm dual-factory complex (10,000+8,000 sqm smart factory). Daily output capacity 1.7 million boxes.

Custom special shape paper box with die-cut unique design — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain rigid box and folding carton enterprise with 23 years of experience (founded 2003). 18,000 sqm factory (10,000+8,000 smart factory) with KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses, backed by ISO 9001:2015 and FSC certifications. Daily output: 1.7 million color boxes + 220,000+ gift boxes.

Production Specifications

  • KBA 1050 4-color offset press with precise multi-pass registration
  • Heidelberg 7+1 UV press for high-end decorative finishes
  • Automated die-cutting line with custom steel rule dies for any shape
  • High-speed gluing and assembly for rigid box construction

Quality Details

  • 100% dimensional verification against approved CAD dieline before production
  • Consistent 90° corner sharpness on rigid box constructions
  • Foil stamping registration tolerance within ±0.5mm
  • Individual QC inspection on special-shape boxes before packing
  • Flat shipping for folding cartons; assembled shipping for rigid boxes
  • Free pre-production sample with 5–7 working day turnaround
  • Edge crush and drop testing for shipping durability on request

Factory

  • 23 years of paper box manufacturing since 2003
  • 18,000 sqm factory (10,000+8,000 smart factory, expanded 2025)
  • 80+ employees across design, printing, die-cutting, and assembly
  • KBA 1050 4-color + Heidelberg 7+1 UV + fully automatic rigid box lines
  • Daily output: 1.7 million color boxes + 220,000+ gift boxes
  • ISO 9001:2015, FSC, High-Tech Enterprise certified
  • Serving 200+ global brands across 50+ countries

When Custom Shapes Win Over Standard Boxes

Not every product needs a custom-shaped box — but for these scenarios, a distinctive silhouette generates measurable ROI:

item.title: Hexagonal Rigid Gift Box with Custom Print & Satin Ribbon — Luxury Confectionery Packaging
item.description:

The magnetic lid with satin ribbon pull creates a ceremonial unboxing experience: the lid lifts smoothly on its magnetic track, the ribbon unfurls, and the confectionery inside is revealed in individually cradled foam cavities.

Luxury candle gift set rigid box with ribbon tie closure and custom foam insert — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience (founded 2003). 18,000 sqm factory (10,000+8,000 smart factory) with KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses. Daily output 1.7 million boxes.

Applications

Customization Options

  • Precision die-cut foam insert with cavities for 2, 3, or 4 candles
  • Hot gold or silver foil stamping on lid and spine
  • Embossed/debossed brand logo with tactile texture

  • Color consistency verified with Heidelberg Prinect Inpress spectrophotometry
  • ΔE ≤ 2.0 color accuracy across full production runs

Sustainability & Compliance

Aspect Detail
Paper Sourcing FSC Chain-of-Custody certified — each shipment traceable to responsibly managed forests
Recyclable Board Greyboard core and surface papers are 100% recyclable in standard paper streams
Adhesive Water-based PVA — biodegradable, VOC-free, compliant with GB/T and EU standards
Foam Insert EVA foam insert is reusable — designed for customer retention, not single-use
Ribbon Satin ribbon sourced from OEKO-TEX certified mills — tested for colorfastness
Factory Waste 95%+ of production paper waste recycled through closed-loop program

Why Choose Bincai for Luxury Candle Packaging

The home fragrance market demands packaging that communicates warmth, craftsmanship, and sophistication — before the customer even lights the candle. Bincai’s rigid box division brings 23 years of luxury packaging expertise to every candle gift set. Our Heidelberg 7+1 UV press creates luminous foil and spot UV effects that catch candlelight, while our in-house foam die-cutting ensures every candle sits securely in transit — no rattling, no breakage, no returns. For candle brands selling in department stores, boutiques, and direct-to-consumer channels, Bincai delivers the complete package: structural protection, sensory unboxing, and sustainability credibility.

item.title: Luxury Christmas Paper Gift Box with Gold Foil Snowflake

item.title: Luxury Orange Two-Piece Rigid Gift Box with Gold Foil
item.description:
Product Overview

A striking two-piece rigid gift box with bold orange art paper wrap and elegant gold foil branding. The lid-and-base construction provides a premium unboxing moment with satisfying friction-fit closure. item.title: Luxury Rectangular Rigid Gift Box with Magnetic Flap UV Spot
item.description:
Product Overview

A sophisticated rectangular rigid gift box with an integrated magnetic flap closure and precision spot UV detailing — the definitive choice for luxury brands seeking understated elegance with a tactile surprise. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certified with 23 years of premium packaging expertise — this box combines 2.5mm greyboard structural integrity with Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV press spot coating. The result: visual depth that catches light on retail shelves, a magnetic flap that closes with a satisfying snap (eliminating ribbons while maintaining clean aesthetics), and a soft-touch matte base with high-gloss spot UV contrast that begs to be touched. Each box is produced on our dedicated rigid box production line — 220,000+ gift boxes daily — at our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility with fully automatic CNC corner wrapping, ensuring consistent quality from the first box to the 100,000th.

item.title: Luxury Square Rigid Gift Box with Gold Foil Stamping

Multi-pass gold foil stamping on Bobst SP 102 BMA delivers crisp, reflective branding that never fades. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color offset and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses across Bincai’s 18,000 sqm dual factory (10,000+8,000 sqm smart factory) in Foshan, Guangdong. ISO 9001:2015 and FSC certified. Daily output 1.7 million boxes. MOQ 500 with free pre-production samples.

item.title: Octagonal Rigid Gift Box with Ribbon Bow Luxury Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

The octagonal (8-sided) rigid gift box breaks free from the rectangular box paradigm with a geometric form that commands attention before it’s even opened. Hand-tied with a generous satin ribbon bow and secured by concealed neodymium magnets, this box transforms gift-giving into theater. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — an ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certified factory with 23 years of luxury packaging expertise — each octagonal box requires specialized die-cutting, angle-calibrated wrapping, and precision magnet placement that only experienced artisans can execute. Our 18,000 sqm Foshan factory (10,000+8,000 smart factory) (plus 8,000 sqm smart factory expansion, 2025) produces 220,000+ rigid boxes daily on Heidelberg 7+1 UV and KBA 1050 presses.

item.description:

From cosmetics and jewelry to electronics and gourmet confectionery, the custom tray insert transforms a beautiful box into a complete packaging solution — all produced on German-engineered KBA 1050 and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses with 23 years of expertise.

item.title: Premium Shoulder-Neck Rigid Gift Box with Magnetic Closure for Luxury Spirits Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Premium Shoulder-Neck Rigid Gift Box redefines luxury spirits gifting with a sculpted architectural silhouette — the recessed shoulder-neck construction creates a striking two-tier profile that cradles premium whiskey, cognac, or baijiu bottles with museum-grade presentation. The magnetic snap closure (4× NdFeB N35 magnets) delivers a satisfying, authoritative close that signals quality to the recipient before the box is even opened. Inside, a velvet-flocked cavity precisely die-cut to the bottle’s base diameter with a 2-glassware side compartment transforms retail liquor packaging into a complete gift experience. At Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — ISO 9001:2015 and FSC certified with 23 years of packaging leadership — every shoulder-neck box is produced on Heidelberg 7+1 UV or KBA Rapida 105 presses, delivering 220,000+ gift boxes daily across our dual-factory 18,000 sqm production campus.

item.title: Rigid Drawer Box with Custom EVA Insert for Premium Stationery Sets
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Rigid Drawer Box is designed for premium stationery brands, corporate gift programs, and luxury pen manufacturers seeking an elegant slide-out presentation format. The drawer mechanism — pulled by a satin ribbon tab and secured with a hidden magnetic catch — creates a ceremonial unboxing that elevates even a simple pen set into a memorable gift. Inside, a CNC-machined EVA foam insert cradles each pen, USB drive, or accessory in its own precision cavity (±0.5mm tolerance), preventing shifting during transit while presenting each item at the optimal viewing angle. For a complete comparison of rigid vs. folding construction — and when each is appropriate for your product — see our Rigid vs. Folding Carton Packaging Guide. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certified with 23 years of packaging expertise — every drawer box passes 10-point QC including slide-force consistency (3-5N ideal range), magnet catch engagement verification, and lamination adhesion cross-hatch testing. Our 18,000 sqm facility (10,000+8,000 smart factory, 2025) delivers 1.7M+ boxes daily on Heidelberg 7+1 UV and KBA 1050 press lines.

item.title: Rigid Gift Box with Ribbon Closure Custom Print Luxury Packaging
item.description:
Elegant rigid gift box with satin ribbon closure custom print luxury packaging — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience (founded 2003). 18,000 sqm factory (10,000+8,000 smart factory) with KBA and Heidelberg presses. Daily output 1.7 million boxes.

Applications

Satin ribbon closures add a tactile, luxurious finish that customers love. Perfect for:

  • Gourmet Food & Confectionery: Premium chocolates, macarons, artisanal biscuits, tea collections
  • Luxury Cosmetics: Skincare gift sets, perfume collections, bath and body gift boxes
  • Apparel & Accessories: Silk scarves, ties, leather goods, designer accessories
  • Corporate Gifts: Executive welcome kits, employee appreciation gifts, holiday corporate presents
  • Wedding & Events: Bridal party favors, guest gifts, table centerpiece boxes
  • Jewelry & Watches: Bracelet boxes, pendant cases, luxury watch presentation

Customization Options

  • Materials: 1200-1800 gsm greyboard wrapped in 157-250 gsm art paper, textured paper, kraft, or leatherette
  • Printing: Full-color CMYK offset on KBA 1050 4-color press; up to 7 colors + UV on Heidelberg 7+1 press
  • Finishing: Gold/silver/copper hot foil stamping, blind embossing/debossing, spot UV varnish, matte/gloss lamination, soft-touch coating, metallic foil accents
  • Closure: Satin ribbon tie in custom colors (Pantone matched), double-ribbon bow, magnetic flap backup, or elastic band
  • Ribbon: 10mm–25mm satin, grosgrain, or velvet ribbon in any color; double-sided or single-sided tie
  • Interior: Custom die-cut foam, velvet/satin lining, cardstock dividers, ribbon pull-tabs, elastic loops
  • Size: Fully customizable from 80×80×30mm (jewelry) to 400×300×100mm (apparel/corporate)

Production Specifications

  • Press: KBA 1050 4-color offset + Heidelberg Speedmaster 7+1 UV
  • Die-Cutting: Automatic Bobst-style die-cutting with ±0.5mm precision
  • Ribbon Attachment: Precision ribbon-insertion station with tension control for consistent bow appearance
  • Gluing: Automatic rigid box forming lines with inline corner taping
  • Assembly: Hand-finishing station for ribbon threading, insert placement, and final QC
  • Daily Capacity: 220,000+ rigid gift boxes per day
  • Lead Time: 10–15 working days for new orders; 7–10 days for repeats
  • MOQ: 500–1000 units; trial orders of 100–300 units accepted

Quality Assurance

  • ISO 9001:2015 certified quality management system
  • FSC Chain of Custody certified — responsible forest sourcing
  • Incoming Inspection: Paper weight (±3%), thickness (±0.05mm), moisture content (5–7%) verified
  • Inline QC: Color density checked every 500 sheets; glue bond tested every hour
  • Final Inspection: AQL 2.5 sampling; dimensional tolerance ±1.5mm; color delta E < 2.0
  • Ribbon QC: Ribbon color pantone match ±1.0 ΔE; knot tension tested for consistency
  • Drop Testing: ISTA 1A simulated drop tests for structural integrity
  • Free pre-production sample with full finishing (freight collect)

Factory

  • 23 years of manufacturing excellence
  • 18,000 sqm production facility (10,000+8,000 smart factory) in Foshan, Guangdong, China
  • KBA 1050 4-color + Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses
  • Fully automatic die-cutting and gluing lines
  • Daily capacity: 1.7 million color boxes + 220,000+ gift boxes
  • Export to 40+ countries across Europe, North America, Middle East, and Southeast Asia

FAQ

Q: Can the ribbon color match my brand’s Pantone color? A: Yes. We stock 50+ satin ribbon colors and can custom dye any Pantone shade with a minimum 500m ribbon order. The dyeing adds 3–5 working days to lead time.

item.title: Rigid Gift Box with Single Tray Telescopic Lid — Watch Collector Display Packaging
item.description:
Premium rigid gift box with telescopic lid and single removable tray — designed for luxury watch collector display. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience (founded 2003). 18,000 sqm integrated factory with KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses. Daily output 1.7 million boxes.

Applications

Industry Application Key Feature
Luxury Watch Brands Collector edition watch packaging Velvet-flocked tray cradles watch securely; telescopic lid reveals product dramatically
Corporate Gift Sets Executive watch gifts, retirement presents Gold foil logo on lid projects premium brand image
Watch Retail In-store display and gift-with-purchase Removable tray doubles as countertop display
Limited Edition Drops Numbered collector series boxing Custom sequential numbering via foil stamping
E-Commerce Luxury Direct-to-consumer luxury watch unboxing Telescopic lid creates unboxing anticipation; 1600gsm core protects during transit
Jewelry & Watch Shows Trade show sample presentation Professional rigid construction withstands repeated handling

Customization Options

Option Available Choices
Box Structure Telescopic lid with single tray, telescopic lid with dual tray, book-style magnetic, or drawer-slide
Greyboard Core 1200gsm, 1600gsm, or 2000gsm — 2000gsm recommended for heavy watch collections
Wrap Material 157gsm art paper, 128gsm coated, premium textured paper, leatherette, or linen fabric
Printing CMYK offset (KBA 1050), Pantone spot colors, full bleed
Hot Stamping Gold, silver, rose gold, copper, holographic, or matte foil — Heidelberg cylinder press
Embossing Blind emboss, foil-over-emboss, or multi-level sculpted emboss
Tray Flocking Velvet flocking in black, grey, navy, burgundy, cream, or custom Pantone
Tray Configuration Single watch cutout, 2-watch, 4-watch, 6-watch, or custom layout
Tray Material Flocked EVA, flocked cardboard, molded pulp, or suede-laminated board
Lid Interior Satin-lined, velvet-flocked, or printed with brand story/certificate
Custom Sizes 100×100×60mm to 400×300×120mm — custom tooling available
MOQ 500 units (standard), 1000+ (custom tray tooling or custom flocking color)

Production Specifications

Specification Detail
Offset Press KBA 1050 4-color — precise registration on art paper wrap
UV Press Heidelberg 7+1 UV — hybrid UV + conventional for specialty coatings
Greyboard Core 1200-2000gsm FSC-certified greyboard — structural rigidity for luxury weight
Box Assembly Automated rigid box line — hand-wrap finishing for corners and edges
Die-Cutting Bobst automatic flatbed die-cutter — ±0.3mm precision for tray cavities
Tray Flocking Electrostatic flocking machine — uniform 0.5mm velvet pile, no shedding
Hot Stamping Heidelberg cylinder — foil-on-demand with registration sensors
Embossing Copper die etching + hydraulic press — 0.3mm–1.5mm relief depth
Corner Wrapping CNC corner-wrapping machine — miter-fold precision ±0.2mm
Adhesives Water-based PVA (no VOC), hot-melt for tray assembly
ISO 9001 Full in-line QC at each station — material receiving through final pack-out audit

Quality Assurance

Inspection Point Method Standard
Board grammage Digital scale ±1gsm Within spec tolerance
Moisture content Pin-type moisture meter ≤8%
Lid-to-base fit Slip gauge 0.5–1.0mm clearance — smooth telescopic action
Telescopic lid parallelism Digital caliper — 8-point measurement ±0.3mm all corners
Flocking density Pile height gauge 0.5mm ±0.1mm uniform across surface
Flocking adhesion Tape test per ASTM D3359 5B — no fiber pull-off
Foil adhesion Tape test on foil stamp 5B — no flaking
Embossing registration Overlay template ±0.2mm
Print registration Overlay template ±0.15mm
Color consistency Spectrophotometer ΔE ≤2.0 from target
Lid drop test 1.2m free-fall with watch simulator No structural failure, tray intact
Surface inspection Visual under D50 lighting No scuffs, wrinkles, glue marks, or foil bleed

FAQ

Q: Can the tray be designed for a specific watch model with precise cavity dimensions?

item.title: Silver Rigid Book-Shaped Cosmetic Gift Box with Blue Velvet Insert
item.description:
Premium custom silver rigid book-shaped cosmetic gift box with blue velvet insert manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com, Audited Supplier with 23 years of experience.

Applications

  • Luxury Cosmetics: Premium packaging for high-end skincare sets, serums, creams, and beauty collections — the sleek silver aesthetic communicates sophistication
  • Perfume & Fragrance: Elegant gift boxes for eau de parfum bottles, fragrance discovery sets, and limited-edition perfume launches
  • Beauty Gift Sets: Complete beauty regimen kits — cleanser, toner, moisturizer, and serum in coordinated presentation
  • Jewelry & Watches: Book-style presentation for luxury timepieces, bracelets, and designer accessories with velvet display interior
  • Spa & Wellness: Premium packaging for spa gift certificates, aromatherapy sets, and wellness product collections
  • Corporate Beauty Branding: OEM/ODM packaging for beauty brands launching premium product lines with custom brand identity

Customization Options

  • Exterior Finish: Metallic silver art paper (mirror, brushed, or matte silver), pearlescent white, holographic, or full Pantone color flexibility
  • Book-Style Opening: Hinged spine with magnetic side flap closure — opens like a luxury book for dramatic product reveal
  • Interior Lining: Velvet flocking in 100+ Pantone colors (deep blue, royal purple, black, champagne, rose), satin, or suede fabric
  • Insert Configuration: Custom die-cut EVA foam tray with precision cavities for each product; flocked vacuum tray; or cardboard grid with satin pull ribbons
  • Decoration: Hot foil stamping (silver, gold, rose gold, holographic) on spine and lid; embossed/debossed logo; spot UV contrast on matte silver; full-color CMYK offset print
  • Additional Features: Magnetic side flap with hidden N35 neodymium magnets, satin pull ribbon, mirror insert in lid, LED lighting strip, or PET window panel
  • Size Range: From compact 120×90×30mm to large 350×250×80mm — fully custom dimensions

Production Specifications

  • Press: KBA 1050 4-color offset press with inline aqueous coating for exterior art paper printing
  • Heidelberg 7+1 UV: Premium spot UV effects, high-gloss accents, and metallic ink simulation
  • Rigid Box Line: Fully automatic production — greyboard cutting, corner wrapping, inner liner mounting, magnet embedding
  • Greyboard Core: 1200gsm–2000gsm rigid greyboard for book-style structural integrity and long-term shape retention
  • Surface Wrapping: 157gsm–250gsm metallic art paper, specialty textured paper, or soft-touch laminated stock
  • Velvet Flocking: Electrostatic flocking process — uniform 0.5mm pile height, 100+ Pantone colors, rub-resistant
  • Magnets: N35–N52 grade neodymium, 8mm–12mm diameter, 2–4 magnets per box for secure book closure
  • Hinge Engineering: Reinforced spine with 157gsm hinge paper, tested to 500+ open/close cycles

Production Quality & Testing

  • Color Accuracy: Heidelberg Prinect Inpress spectrophotometry — ΔE ≤ 2.0 across full production; metallic silver consistency batch-to-batch
  • Velvet Quality: Rub-fastness testing to ISO 105-X12; pile density ≥ 80 fibers/mm²; no shedding after vibration test
  • Magnet Testing: Pull-force verification at 3.5–5.5N per magnet pair; 500+ open/close cycle without magnet dislodgement
  • Hinge Durability: Repeated open/close testing — 500+ cycles with zero hinge paper tear or delamination
  • Surface Inspection: 100% visual inspection under D50 standard lighting (ISO 3664:2009); metallic surface checked for scratches, fingerprints, and color uniformity
  • Drop Testing: ISTA 1A certified — 0.8m drop on all 6 faces, 4 edges, and 4 corners
  • ISO 9001:2015: Full quality management system from raw material receiving through finished goods inspection
  • FSC Certified: Chain-of-custody certified paperboard sourced from responsibly managed forests

Seven-Stage QC Gates

Stage Inspection Point Standard
Gate 1 — Raw Material Intake Greyboard thickness, moisture content, art paper color consistency, velvet pile height, magnet pull-force ISO 9001:2015 incoming material sampling plan; greyboard ±5% caliper tolerance; magnet ≥3.5N per pair
Gate 2 — Pre-Press Rip Review Artwork file integrity, trap/overprint settings, color separation accuracy, hot-foil die registration Heidelberg Prinect preflight; trapping ≥0.08mm; spectrophotometric proof matched to GRACoL 2013
Gate 3 — Print Run Inline Color density, dot gain, register (±0.1mm), metallic silver consistency across full run Heidelberg Prinect Inpress spectrophotometry; ΔE ≤ 2.0; inline aqueous coating coverage ≥95%
Gate 4 — Post-Print Surface Check Scratches, fingerprints, foil adhesion, lamination bubbles, spot UV alignment 100% visual under D50 lighting (ISO 3664:2009); tape-test foil adhesion — zero lift; no surface defect >0.3mm
Gate 5 — Box Assembly & Structure Greyboard corner wrap precision, magnet embedding depth, hinge gap tolerance, inner liner flushness Corner wrap tolerance ±0.5mm; magnet flush ≤0.2mm; hinge gap 0.8–1.2mm; inner liner zero peeling
Gate 6 — Finished Goods AQL Box closure alignment, velvet insert fit, lid/book opening smoothness, overall aesthetic AQL 2.5 Level II (major); AQL 4.0 Level II (minor); 500-cycle hinge endurance pass; velvet rub-fastness ISO 105-X12 Grade 4+
Gate 7 — Pre-Shipment Audit Carton drop test, pallet stacking stability, humidity protection, barcode scannability, label accuracy ISTA 1A drop test pass (0.8m, all faces/edges/corners); barcode Grade B or above (ISO 15416); packaging moisture barrier intact

FAQ

Q: What is the minimum order quantity (MOQ) for this silver book-shaped cosmetic box?

item.description:
Product Overview

This custom printed rigid box combines the tactile prestige of embossed logo detailing with the brilliance of gold foil stamping — a premium packaging format trusted by luxury brands worldwide. Rigid set-up boxes (also called “hard boxes” or “turn-edge boxes”) are constructed by wrapping printed paper over dense greyboard, creating a substantial, non-collapsible structure that conveys quality from the first touch. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing, every box passes through 15 precision QC checkpoints across our 18,000 sqm integrated facility. With Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses for exceptional color fidelity, KBA 1050 offset for volume production, and over 23 years of rigid box expertise (founded 2003), Bincai delivers over 220,000+ gift boxes daily — all under ISO 9001:2015 quality management and FSC Chain-of-Custody certification.

item.description:

Designed for fragrance brands that demand shelf impact without compromising product protection, this box combines a precision die-cut viewing window (PET or biodegradable PLA film) with rigid 1.5–3.0mm greyboard construction, hidden N42/N52 neodymium magnetic closure, and velvet or custom-fit foam interior cushioning. item.title: Custom Shape Rigid Paper Box with Die-Cut Window Display
item.description:
The Bincai Advantage — Why Custom Shape Rigid Boxes Set Your Brand Apart

Custom shape rigid boxes are the ultimate packaging statement — they announce that what’s inside isn’t ordinary. Unlike standard rectangular boxes that fade into the retail shelf, a custom die-cut silhouette immediately signals design intent. At Bincai, we’ve engineered over 200 unique custom shape projects for clients across perfume, luxury cosmetics, premium electronics, and limited-edition collectibles. Our in-house tooling department produces custom steel-rule dies in 48 hours (standard shapes) to 5 working days (complex contours), with interchangeable window inserts so a single die base can serve multiple product SKUs. Every custom shape box passes through our 15-point QC system where ±0.2mm window precision, ±1mm lid gap uniformity, and corner-wrapped seam integrity are verified against the CAD-approved sample before mass production begins. This is packaging that doesn’t just protect — it performs on shelf, in hand, and in the unboxing moment.

item.title: Premium Rigid Gift Box for Wine Bottle Velvet Lining
item.description: Luxury rigid gift box for wine bottle packaging with plush velvet lining interior — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience (founded 2003). This premium presentation box elevates single and dual-bottle wine packaging for wineries, distilleries, corporate gifting, and duty-free retail. The rigid greyboard construction (2–3mm thickness over 1,200gsm chipboard) provides superior crush-resistance during transport while delivering a satisfying, weighty unboxing experience that signals luxury. KBA 1050 4-color offset press and Heidelberg 7+1 UV press deliver precision printing across our 18,000 sqm (10,000+8,000 smart factory) ISO 9001 & FSC certified factory. Daily output capacity of 1.7 million boxes ensures reliable supply for large-volume orders. The velvet-lined bottle cavity is precision die-cut to cradle the bottle securely, preventing movement and label scuffing during shipping. Neodymium N35 magnetic closure provides a flush, silent close with over 1,000 cycles of durability tested.

item.title: Rigid Cardboard Gift Box with Matte Lamination Spot UV
item.description:
Overview

Guangdong Bincai Color Printing’s rigid cardboard gift box with matte lamination and spot UV creates a tactile luxury experience through contrast: the velvety soft-touch matte surface meets precisely registered high-gloss spot UV accents. Magnetic closure, custom foam/satin interior, and rigid 2.0–3.0mm board construction convey premium quality. Manufactured in our ISO 9001:2015 certified 18,000 sqm facility (10,000+8,000 smart factory) with Heidelberg 7+1 UV and KBA 1050 presses — 23 years, daily output 1.7 million boxes.

item.title: Rigid Paper Box with Silver Hot Stamping for Corporate Gifts
item.description:
Luxury rigid paper box with silver hot foil stamping designed for premium corporate gifting — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a 23-year full-chain packaging enterprise (founded 2003) in Foshan, China. 18,000 sqm factory (10,000+8,000 smart factory) with KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV offset presses plus Bobst hot foil stamping. Daily output 1.7 million boxes. ISO 9001 & FSC certified.

Applications

  • Executive corporate gift sets and year-end appreciation gifts
  • Premium promotional kits for brand launches and VIP events
  • Award and recognition packaging for corporate ceremonies
  • Luxury pen, desk accessory, and executive stationery presentation
  • High-end electronics accessory gift packaging
  • Premium wine, spirits, and gourmet food gift boxing
  • Custom-branded onboarding welcome kits for Fortune 500 clients
  • Charity gala and fundraising event gift packaging

Customization Options

  • Foil Stamping: Silver, champagne silver, brushed silver, matte silver, holographic silver, or custom metallic Pantone; single or multi-level foil registration
  • Structure: Two-piece lid-and-base, magnetic flap, book-style hinge, or drawer-slide with ribbon pull
  • Exterior Wrapping: 128–200gsm art paper in matte, gloss, soft-touch velvet, linen-textured, or pearlescent finishes
  • Interior Lining: Velvet, suede, satin, or flocked EVA in 15+ color options; die-cut foam insert for product nesting
  • Embossing: Blind emboss, deboss, or foil-registered combination emboss for 3D logo and pattern effects
  • Edge Finishing: Silver edge gilding to match foil stamping; colored edge painting for brand palette alignment
  • Add-Ons: Magnetic closure, satin ribbon pull-tab, gold/silver edge gilding, printed insert card, outer sleeve/obi band
  • Size Range: Compact 120×90×30mm (pen box) to 450×350×120mm (multi-item gift hamper)

Production Specifications

  • KBA Rapida 105 4-color: High-speed precision offset at 15,000 sheets/hour
  • Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV: Specialty metallic coatings and instant UV curing
  • Bobst SP 102 BMA: Hot foil stamping with ±0.15mm registration accuracy and multi-zone temperature control
  • Rigid Box Assembly: Fully automatic line — greyboard cutting (1000–2000gsm), corner taping, wrapping paper lamination, interior lining, and final assembly
  • Greyboard: 1000gsm–2000gsm FSC-certified recycled greyboard; double-ply lamination for structural integrity
  • Foil Film: High-grade polyester-based silver foil — 12μm thickness for crisp edge definition
  • Lead Time: 10–15 working days for new tooling; 7–10 days for repeat orders
  • Daily Capacity: 220,000+ rigid gift boxes per day

Quality Details

  • ISO 9001:2015 certified — documented quality gates from material receiving through final packaging
  • FSC Chain-of-Custody — certified sustainable paper throughout the supply chain
  • Foil Adhesion: Tape test (3M #810 + 3M #600) — zero foil lift; Sutherland rub test — 50 double rubs, no visible wear
  • Foil Registration: 100% inspection — ≤0.15mm deviation on all axes
  • Corner Integrity: Four-corner drop test (1m onto concrete) — no corner splitting or delamination
  • Lid Fit: ±0.5mm tolerance on lid-to-base clearance; smooth open/close action
  • Color Consistency: Delta E ≤ 2.0 across production runs for brand color matching
  • Silver Tarnish: Accelerated aging test (72h at 57°C / 95% RH) — no discoloration or oxidation
  • Free pre-production sample with full decoration — 5–7 working day turnaround

Factory

  • 23 years of manufacturing excellence since 2003 in Foshan, Guangdong, China
  • 18,000 sqm integrated facility (10,000+8,000 smart factory, commissioned 2025)
  • 80+ skilled employees including dedicated rigid box craftspeople
  • KBA 1050 4-color + Heidelberg 7+1 UV + Bobst foil stamping + fully automatic rigid box assembly line
  • In-house foil stamping, embossing, die-cutting, and edge gilding — no subcontracting
  • Export to 40+ countries with rigid gift boxes as a flagship product category
  • Daily capacity: 1.7 million boxes total (220,000+ dedicated rigid gift box capacity)
